CustomField.formula: IF( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Time",MarginAmountCHF__c/InvoicePOSTotalTimeCHF__c , IF( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Expense",MarginAmountCHF__c/InvoicePOSTotalExpenseCHF__c , IF( RecordType.DeveloperName = "SupplierCosts", MarginAmountCHF__c/InvoicePOSTotalSupplierCostsCHF__c ,0)))
CustomField.label: Margin - %
